title: Update urvave/CLI and add handling of short options.

comments.body:
LGTM

I hope the upstream patch gets merged soon.
Me too, nice work waking them up.

LGTM
But your title got me overly excited.  I was thinking @vrothberg's patch had been merged upstream finally.

Tests are passing now. Travis had some serious hiccups.

@rh-atomic-bot r=TomSweeneyRedHat
